programs.title: Dropped: Project Alaska 2.0: Rising Waters
programs.desc: Chris and Casey Keefer continue their down river journey as an Alaskan rain storm moves in that carrier heavy repercussions for their success.

programs.title: Fight to Survive: Mountain Lion Attack
programs.desc: Marine Anne Hjelle was mountain biking when she was ripped off her bike by a mountain lion. Anne fought back even as the big cat shredded her face in its jaws. Surviving the attack was only the beginning of Anne's incredible fight to survive.

programs.title: Danger Decoded
programs.desc: Disaster looms at the Isle of Man Tourist Trophy Races  a shocking natural occurrence in Italy  a corkscrew twist at a Californian air show.

programs.title: Danger Decoded
programs.desc: Catching another collection of on-camera calamities, featuring rally cars speeding along Italian roads, and a terrifying dust devil that's out of control.

programs.title: Air Rescue
programs.desc: The Westpac crew help a bushwalker in trouble  one false move will put everyone in danger  the crew also have to save a stabbing victim on their way to the hospital.

programs.title: Air Rescue
programs.desc: Two fisherman survive a night at sea by clinging to an Esky, and the rescue makes international headlines  a man loses his ring fingers when his motorbike crashes.
